data.current_summary: Post a new signature to the user's signature chain
data.description_suggestion: Adds a new signature to the authenticated user's signature chain. Requires a valid signature payload in the request body. Returns a status response confirming the signature was added. This operation appends to the user's cryptographic signature history and may trigger chain validation.

data.current_summary: Terminate all active sessions for the current user
data.description_suggestion: Terminates all active sessions for the authenticated user, effectively logging out from all devices and applications. Requires valid session authentication. Returns a status response confirming all sessions were terminated. The current session making this request will also be invalidated.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented.
